name: Attacking
description:
[Offensive]
Attacker CQC/Melee vs Defender choice of action.
 Attackers get 2 offensive actions per turn. If attacker lands both hits in their turn, they get a third action for free. This attack can be either undodgeable or unblockable.
 Attackers can also make a heavy attack via applying a -1 dice to their roll in exchange for adding 1 to their damage if lands.

 All attacks with hands are CQC, all attacks utilizing an object as a weapon are Melee.

name: Grappling
description:
[Offensive]
Attacker CQC versus Defender CQC. If attacker wins, attacker has defender in a grapple to varying degrees of control.
 -------------
 MOF 2+: Whiff, Defender punish. 
 MOF 1-0: Bunt, no extra action. 
 MOS 1/2: Partial, shove 
 MOS 3+: Full, attack/shove (now is a guaranteed knockdown that makes them prone if they fail)

 If opponent runs within 2 hexes of you while not in CQC with someone else, you are entitled to a grab attempt at them. However, you move to their position immediately and it can drag you out of cover. Upon MOS of 2+, you can drag them towards you instead. 

 Opponent recieves -1 to all actions while grappled. Goes both ways when they return the favor. When grappled, defenders have a -1 to all defending for that turn until let go.

name: Disarming
description:
[Offensive]
Attacker CQC/Melee vs Defender Alertness. Attacker must have at least 2 MoS to succeed.

 If the defender succeeds, nothing happens. if attacker succeeds, the weapon is knocked out of the defender's hands. If using CQC, the weapon is now in the attackers hands

name: Tripping
description:
[Offensive]
Attacker CQC vs Defender Notice. 
 MOS of 2+ required for a knockdown. 
 MOS of 1 applies a -1 to defender's next action or check (Off Stance)

name: Shove
description:
[Offensive]
Attacker CQC vs Defender Body to resist.
 Shoves the defender up to 3+ body hexes away. If Defender knocked into wall/cover, they recieve a -1 malus on their next defending action.
 if from a full control shove, immediate knockdown. Walls compound.
 if MOS >2 or in a grapple with full control, opponent is knocked down (prone).

name: Recover
description:
[Defensive]
Roll Body. Recover a temporary deep wound, or temporary flesh equivalent based off of the result of your roll on the curve of: 
 1-2 = 0 Deep Wounds
 2-4 = 1 Deep wounds
 5-6 = 2 Deep wounds
 -And then end turn immediately.

name: Dodge
description:
[Defensive]
 Defender Athletics vs Attacker roll. 
Every consecutive dodge will incur a -1 dice malus until you Recover. Converts all attacks to flesh wounds if MOF less than 2. Upon MOS of 2+, Defender Punish.

name: Block
description:
[Defensive]
 Defender Body Stat vs Attacker roll.
 Every consecutive block will incur a -1 dice malus until you Recover. Always reduces MOS by 1. negates instant death even when failed, but cases wound overflow instead.

name: Parry
description:
[Defensive]
 Defender matching stat vs Attacker roll
 Parrying requires an MOS of 2 to succeed, if it fails, the attack goes through with at least MOS of 1. If successful, immediately ends Attacker turn. MOS of 3+ results in a defender punish.
